text.title: Seven Performance Domains (PMBOK 8) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the seven-performance-domains methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: one_owner_per_domain
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each of the 7 domains must have exactly one named accountable owner; absence forces drift to green in status reports.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `one-owner-per-domain` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: value_realisation_tracked
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Value-realisation rate (outcomes realised / outputs shipped) must appear on every status report alongside delivery rate.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `value-realisation-tracked` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: communications_not_implicit
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Communications must have an explicit plan inside the Stakeholders domain — not assumed because Communications was absorbed.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `communications-not-implicit` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: domain_baseline_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each domain must have a written baseline (scope, schedule, finance, risk) before status reporting begins.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `domain-baseline-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: sustainability_measurable
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: If Sustainability is in scope, at least one measurable environmental/social/economic metric must be defined.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `sustainability-measurable` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-seven-performance-domains.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
